education.degree: ABHINESH MK Department Manager / Head Cashier / Inventory PROFILE Dynamic and results-driven retail manager with over 5 years of experience in high-volume fashion retail environments, currently serving as Head Cashier and Department Manager at Max Fashion. Demonstrated success in driving sales performance, optimizing store operations, and leading cross-functional teams to exceed business objectives. Expert in visual merchandising, inventory control, cash management, and team development. WORK EXPERIENCE EDUCATION MAX FASHION ETTUMANOOR STORE BISHOP SPEECHLY COLLEGE Department Manager and Head Cashier 2023 MG UNIVERSITY Bachelor of Business Administration Keeping track of inventory levels. 2016 - Not completed Making sure every product is stocked. Planning purchases. MT SEMINARY HIGHER Staying in touch with suppliers to keep product stock from running out. SECONDARY SCHOOL Ensuring customer service needs are met. Overseeing daily operations, leading a team, managing inventory and ensuring 12th percentage : 62% customer satisfaction within their designated department. 2015 10th percentage : 75% key responsibilities: 2013 Team Leadership: Hiring, training and supervising staff members, conducting performance reviews and addressing employee issues. 2024 - 2025 Inventory Management: SKILLS Monitoring inventory levels, planning purchases and maintaining stock to prevent shortages, ensuring optimal product availability, Sales and Revenue. Point-Of-Sale (POS) system Store operations: Inventory Management Organizing product displays and ensuring a positive shopping experience for Cash Handling customers. Customer Service Financial Management Leadership Tracking department sales performance, Managing expenses and contributing to Communication overall departmental profitability Team Leadership Communication and collaboration Performance Management Communicating effectively with other department managers, store leader Supervising and Training cashiers Managing checkout Operations Financial Tasks LANGUAGES Responsible for resolving cash tills at the end of each shift, generating accurate reports, ensuring the safety of cash and change. English Maintaining Accuracy and Efficiency Malayalam The Head Cashier ensures all transactions are processed accurately and efficiently, Hindi using point-of-sale systems and adhering to company procedures. Responding to Price Check Requests Respond to customer requests for price checks and provide other forms of customer service. CONTACT FINCH CAFE AND CAKES KOTTAYAM +91 9746003765 Store Manager 2019-2022 KOTTAYAM mkabhinesh56@gm,ail.com Manage day-to-day operations of the cafe. Coordinate with vendors and order supplies Maintain updated records of daily, weekly ,monthly revenues and expenses REFERENCE Advise staff on the best ways to resolve issues with clients and deliver excellent customer service Adharsh G Mohammed Ijas Nurture friendly relationships with customers to increase loyalty and Department Manager [R&B] Store Manager [BATA] boost our reputation 8921278286 9645890796 adharshgpk45@gmail.com ijasjunaid23@gmail.com
